summary: SINGLE_FOCUS ComplexPlane for f(z)=z²-1. Three orbits drawn as color-coded chains of Dots + fading connection Lines: BLUE orbit starting at 0.3+0.05i converges to the attracting fixed point (Fatou), GREEN orbit at -0.7 falls onto the 2-cycle {0, -1} (Fatou), RED orbit starting near the Julia boundary at 0.618+0.01i shows chaotic bouncing. Legend labels each behavior; bottom YELLOW Tex summarizes the Fatou/Julia dichotomy.
